title: Configure the Uniface Router for Multiple Tomcat Engines
breadcrumbs: Deployment Considerations for Performance and Scalability
Configure the Uniface Router for Multiple Tomcat Engines
text: Configure the Uniface Router for Multiple Tomcat Engines Edit the urouter.asn file to define a Uniface Router for each Tomcat server. For example: [SERVERS] ; For Uniface WebApplication Server wasv1 = " UnifaceInstallDir /common/bin/userver.exe" wasv2 = " UnifaceInstallDir /common/bin/userver.exe" Copy For each Tomcat server, modify the web.xml file in UnifaceInstallDir /common/webapps/webapps/uniface/WEB-INF/ to point to the correct Uniface Router. Edit the MIDDLEWARE parameter of the WRD servlet; for example: <init-param> <param-name>MIDDLEWARE</param-name> <param-value>UV8:localhost+13001| Server1 /userver|userver|wasv1</param-value> </init-param> Copy Was this topic helpful?
